CustomField.description: Does the Applicant and/or Co-Applicant work in the County? Use this field to report on applicant demographics and/or track eligibility requirements related to residency.
CustomField.inlineHelpText:
Does the Applicant and/or Co-Applicant work in the County?
Use this field to report on applicant demographics and/or track eligibility requirements related to residency.
CustomField.label: Work in County
